message:
fix(cli): correct UTF-8 truncation in truncatePrompt

The previous implementation used i >= targetLen which could still
exceed maxLen bytes when a multi-byte character ends after the target.
Also, the fallback "return s" could return a string exceeding maxLen.

Fixed by:
- Using i > targetLen (break before exceeding)
- Tracking prevI to always slice at a valid rune boundary
- Returning s[:prevI] + "..." as fallback instead of full string

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
